info.name: Workday Integration Workday Human Capital Management API

description.content:
API for managing employee data, recruiting, talent management, and workforce planning within Workday's HCM suite. Provides REST-based web services for reading and writing HR data including worker records, organizational structures, and staffing transactions.

Contact Support:
 Name: Workday API Support
 Email: api-support@workday.com
